findings.location: scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs synthetic fixture set tenant boundary live-check loop
findings.title: Live-check loop branches on human-readable label suffix
findings.detail: The added live-execution loop distinguishes deny-result cases from throw-expected cases via label.endsWith("mismatch"). This couples control flow to display strings. Validation-only, no runtime impact, and does not affect correctness of the current five cases.

security_notes: Actor tenant mismatch and fixture-set tenant mismatch emit independent blocked refs and force deny_blocked_claim_required with precheck_passed=false.
Any truthy forbidden or unknown boundary claim throws fail-closed, including tenant bypass, cross-tenant allow, fixture generation, fixture persistence, and product write claims.
The result validator re-derives mismatch invariants and rejects pass/decision/blocked-ref inconsistencies.
The precheck is pure in-memory metadata over the S02 normalized request and does not generate or persist fixtures, create routes, execute services, or write product state.
Matter trace tenant validation is deferred to RP00.P02.M06.S04 without asserting a runtime authorization claim in S03.
test_notes: Five new unit tests cover policy binding, same-tenant allow path, actor and fixture-set mismatch denies, forbidden and unknown claim rejection, module no-write shape, S04 handoff, and fixture mirror.
RP00 validator live checks normalize and precheck the S02 fixture input, compare the result to fixture tenant_boundary_result, validate the result, and exercise deny and throw paths.
Pre-review evidence: syntax checks passed; node --test packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js passed 431/431; RP00 validator failed only for expected missing CP00-019 evidence files.
raw_review.summary: CP00-019 correctly adds a deterministic metadata-only Synthetic Fixture Set tenant boundary precheck for RP00.P02.M06.S03. It denies actor and fixture-set tenant mismatches, fails closed on forbidden or unknown boundary claims, preserves no-real-data/no-write/no-fixture-generation boundaries, keeps RP00.P02.M06 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M06.S04. No P0/P1/P2 findings; one non-blocking P3 validator style finding.

raw_review_text: Review complete. PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No blockers: 0 P0/P1/P2, 1 P3 note. CP00-019 is internally consistent across contract, policy/module, fixture, test, README, and RP validator; the only outstanding validator item is expected evidence assembly.
adjudication_notes: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no P0, P1, or P2 findings. One P3 finding is deferred in adjudication.md.
